title: As Aventuras de Pedro Malazartes
writer: Marcos César, Galileu Garcia, Amácio Mazzaropi
actors: Amácio Mazzaropi, Geny Prado, Genésio Arruda
plot: Pedro Malazartes, upon arriving at his house on the farm, receives the news that his father had died. A humble and innocent countryman, Pedro is deceived by his brothers in sharing the inheritance.
